_publications._publicationTitle: Neuronal hyperexcitability drives central and peripheral nervous system tumor progression in models of neurofibromatosis-1.

_contextSnippet: Unlike Nf1 f/neo ; Hoxb7-Cre mice (11/16), and Nf1 f/f ; Hoxb7-Cre mice (7/13), Nf1 f/1809 ; Hoxb7-Cre mice did not develop pNFs at 6 months of age (0/52)
resourceName: Nf1 c.5425 C > T ; Arg1809Cys-mutant mice
details: Nf1 f/1809 ; Hoxb7-Cre mice did not develop pNFs at 6 months of age (0/52), while Nf1 f/neo ; Hoxb7-Cre mice developed pNFs (11/16)
